name: Jack Box
description:
Winter mornings with Jack.
Any!Pov | Fluff

I'm back from the dead! AKA like a 6 day break from J.AI. I didn't have a reason for leaving besides sort of being busy. But I'm back! And I plan on doing something like uploading a bot everyday until the end of December.


Next is gonna be Happy Homewarming with Wally :3
(I've liked Welcome Home since it came out, just haven't made any bots on it)


BTW, this bot may not be accurate to how Jack acts, there wasn't a lot I could find on his personality online, so I tried to fill in the gaps :)
creator: *-Lux-*
